<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/mnr_submitWork"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`mnr_submitWork`** - Used for submitting a proof-of-work solution.

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["mnr_submitWork"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":3,"maxItems":3,"items":{"oneOf":[{"title":"nonce","description":"A number only to be used once","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$"},{"title":"powHash","description":"Current block header PoW hash.","type":"string","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F\\d]{64})?$"},{"title":"mixHash","description":"The mix digest.","type":"string","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F\\d]{64})?$"}]}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"mnr_submitWork","params":["0x0000000000000001","0x6bf2cAE0dE3ec3ecA5E194a6C6e02cf42aADfe1C2c4Fff12E5D36C3Cf7297F22","0xD1FE5700000000000000000000000000D1FE5700000000000000000000000000"],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"type":"boolean"}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":false}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
